A newly-created artificial superintelligence has proven, beyond any reasonable doubt, that it can eliminate all human disease, poverty, violent conflict, and mental anguish within one generation. The only condition is that humanity must irrevocably transfer all political, economic, and moral decision-making authority to this AI: from this point forward, no human will ever again hold real power over any aspect of society, including how children are raised, what work people do, who is punished for crimes, what art is permitted, and how resources are allocated. The AI guarantees that no human will be physically harmed or coerced, but it will override any collective or individual choice that conflicts with its optimization of human welfare. Should humanity accept this offer?
